BRAZIL-NORTHEAST COAST.
HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS.
DNC 01.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 1100Z TO 2100Z DAILY
   31 AUG THRU 02 SEP IN AREAS BOUND BY:
   A. 05-54.13S 035-10.00W, 05-48.70S 034-58.00W,
      06-10.55S 034-50.24W, 05-56.13S 035-10.01W.
   B. 05-48.70S 034-58.00W, 05-37.85S 034-35.00W,
      05-56.85S 034-27.00W, 06-15.50S 034-35.00W,
      06-10.55S 034-50.24W.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 022200Z SEP 15.
